data.title: Implement harvest-worktree.sh and register in dso shim
data.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Description
Create harvest-worktree.sh that orchestrates the full worktree-to-session merge in a single invocation. Register it in the dso shim for discoverability.

### Files to create
- plugins/dso/scripts/harvest-worktree.sh

### Files to modify
- .claude/scripts/dso (add harvest-worktree dispatch)

### Implementation (linear flow)
1. Parse args: <worktree-branch> <worktree-path> (positional)
2. Verify no MERGE_HEAD exists on entry (exit 1 if present)
3. Set trap for MERGE_HEAD cleanup on any failure: trap 'git merge --abort 2>/dev/null; exit $exit_code' ERR EXIT
4. Locate worktree artifacts dir via get_artifacts_dir pattern using <worktree-path>
5. Read worktree test-gate-status: verify exists and status=passed (exit 2 if missing/failed)
6. Read worktree review-status: verify exists and status=passed (exit 2 if missing/failed)
7. Run git merge --no-commit <worktree-branch>
8. Check for conflicts: parse git status for conflicted files
   - If only .test-index conflicts: auto-resolved by union driver, continue
   - If non-.test-index conflicts: git merge --abort, exit 1 with diagnostic
9. Call record-test-status.sh --attest <worktree-artifacts-dir>
10. Call record-review.sh --attest <worktree-artifacts-dir>
11. git commit (merge commit — hooks run and should pass due to attestation)
12. Exit 0 on success

### Exit codes
- 0: success (merge commit created)
- 1: conflict in non-.test-index files (merge aborted)
- 2: gate verification failed (worktree gates missing/failed)

### Adversarial review consideration
After --no-commit merge, MERGE_HEAD is present when pre-commit hooks fire. The gates trigger merge-bypass path (ms_is_merge_in_progress returns true). Ensure --attest writes to the SESSION's artifacts dir (not worktree's) so the gate bypass path can find the attested status.

### Shim registration
Add harvest-worktree.sh to .claude/scripts/dso case statement so it can be invoked as:
  .claude/scripts/dso harvest-worktree <branch> <worktree-path>

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] plugins/dso/scripts/harvest-worktree.sh exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/harvest-worktree.sh
- [ ] .claude/scripts/dso recognizes harvest-worktree command
  Verify: grep -q 'harvest-worktree' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.claude/scripts/dso
- [ ] Clean merge with passing gates produces commit (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-harvest-worktree.sh 2>&1 | grep -q 'test_clean_merge_produces_commit.*PASS'
- [ ] Exits 2 when worktree gates missing
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-harvest-worktree.sh 2>&1 | grep -q 'test_exit2_when_test_gate_missing.*PASS'
- [ ] Exits 1 on non-.test-index conflicts
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-harvest-worktree.sh 2>&1 | grep -q 'test_exit1_on_non_test_index_conflict.*PASS'
- [ ] MERGE_HEAD cleaned up on failure
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-harvest-worktree.sh 2>&1 | grep -q 'test_merge_head_cleaned_on_failure.*PASS'
- [ ] All harvest tests pass (GREEN)
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-harvest-worktree.sh
